title: Mogswamp's Modpack
description: The modpack used by Mogswamp when playing and making content for Minecraft!
body:
![Mogswamp Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1425f48df8cdbf8d121a46c1c8030cbf78cf117.png) ‎
[![Subscribe Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b228d643085497c532f351343e3745b72c24174.png)](https://www.youtube.com/mogswamp/) ‎ ‎ ‎[![Patreon Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6027e3c7e9f2bebcd0937070d6e08165a57622e8.png)](https://patreon.com/mogswamp)
All mods, resource packs, and settings used by **[Mogswamp](https://youtube.com/mogswamp)** for creating content and playing superflat! Play the gamemode that started it all - Mogswamp style. This is a very vanilla pack with a few tweaks for improved gameplay, performance, and superflat fun. Start your own world, play with recommended world seeds, and join the official [Mogswamp superflat server](https://www.flatnet.gg/)! ‎ ‎ ‎
MODPACK FEATURES
![Mogswamp Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a392a2611a86fa47aa62e8f2da8ba6fca6320004.png) ## ☀️ VISUALS | **MOD** | **INFO** | |:--------------------|:----------------------| |**[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)**|Expand your view distance.| |**[Cool Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/coolrain)**|Ambiant and dynamic rain sounds.| |**[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**|Adds efficient connected textures. In this case, it adds connected glass.| |**[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)**|Allows certain resource pack functionality for models.| |**[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**|Allows certain resource pack functionality for textures.| |**[Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement)**|Enhances the look of explosions.| |**[Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain)**|Replaces default rain with different particles. Highly configurable and optimizable.| |**[Simple Fog Control](https://modrinth.com/mod/simplefog)**|Allows control over water, nether, and terrain fog.| |**[Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes)**|Waves and splashes appear when boating and swimming.| ## ⚙️ PERFORMANCE | **MOD** | **INFO** | |:--------------------|:----------------------| |**[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)**|Smarter rendering for entities.| |**[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)**|General purpose optimization mod with configurable settings.| |**[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**|Powerful performance mod that is highly configurable.| |**[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)**|Additional Sodium options including a search bar and UX improvements.| ## 💻 UTILITIES | **MOD** | **INFO** | |:--------------------|:----------------------| |**[Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback)**|Record and create video of your Minecraft gameplay.| |**[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)**|Allows for use of shaders.| |**[Mini Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud)**|Adds various in-game data renders and overlays.| |**[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**|Allows you to view mods you have installed and adjust settings.| |**[Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo)**|Adds many "tweaks" to the game like gamma override, freecam, and more.| |**[Tweakermore](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakermore)**|An additional tweak kit for Tweakeroo such as weather and time overrides.| |**[Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)**|Voice chat functionality in game for multiplayer.| |**[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)**|Adds a full screen world map with waypoints and configurable data.| ## 🔨 BUILDING TOOLS | **MOD** | **INFO** | **DOCUMENTATION** | |:--------------------|:----------------------|:---------------------:| |**[Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom)**|All-in-one visual tool for building.|https://axiomdocs.moulberry.com/| |**[Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)**|Create and build from schematics in both creative and survival.|https://github.com/maruohon/litematica/wiki| |**[World Edit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit)**|A command based building tool.|https://worldedit.enginehub.org/en/latest/| ![Mogswamp Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a392a2611a86fa47aa62e8f2da8ba6fca6320004.png) ## 🎨 RESOURCE PACKS | **PACK** | **INFO** | |:--------------------|:----------------------| |**[Fresh Food](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-food)**|Transforms all foods into 3D versions with eating animations.| |**[Mogswamp Totem](https://discord.gg/mogswamp)**|Mogswampified totem of undying.| |**[Mogswamp Totem 3D](https://discord.gg/mogswamp)**|Mogswampified totem of undying, but in 3D.| |**[Miko Totem](https://discord.gg/mogswamp)**|Mogswamp's cat Miko totem of undying.| ![Mogswamp Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a392a2611a86fa47aa62e8f2da8ba6fca6320004.png) ## 🌎 SUPERFLAT WORLDS There are five available superflat worlds to play in this modpack, all upgraded from 1.17.1 so all structures are available. If you'd like to play in Mogswamp's 13 year old survival world, [click here](https://www.patreon.com/posts/java-flatworld-130271876) for the world download! | **SEED** | **INFO** | |:--------------------|:----------------------| |**[-4909812083363469846](https://www.chunkbase.com/apps/slime-finder#seed=-4909812083363469846&platform=java)**|Mogswamp's superflat world seed.| |**[28833042](https://www.chunkbase.com/apps/slime-finder#seed=28833042&platform=java)**|Large area of no slime chunks around spawn.| |**[46238141](https://www.chunkbase.com/apps/slime-finder#seed=46238141&platform=java&x=-175&z=-1660&zoom=1.235)**|No slime chunks around a stronghold in ring one (x -175 z -1660).| |**[3707468](https://www.chunkbase.com/apps/slime-finder#seed=3707468&platform=java&x=2025&z=840&zoom=1)**|No slime chunks around a stronghold in ring one (x 2025 z 840).| |**[47143611](https://www.chunkbase.com/apps/slime-finder#seed=47143611&platform=java&x=-1625&z=1252&zoom=1.121)**|No slime chunks around a stronghold in ring one (x -1625 z 1252).| ![Mogswamp Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a392a2611a86fa47aa62e8f2da8ba6fca6320004.png) ## 📞 SUPPORT **For Help or Issues**: 1. Check the logs for errors. 2. Verify you have Fabric installed correctly. 3. Ensure the modpack is up to date. 4. Contact support via my Discord: https://discord.gg/mogswamp ![Mogswamp Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a392a2611a86fa47aa62e8f2da8ba6fca6320004.png) **Never played superflat survival before? Don't worry, check out this video on how to get started!** ---
